programme.title: Capítulo 92
programme.desc: Mia accuses Miguel to Esteban of spying on her in the bathroom. Miguel and Julieta begin dating again.

programme.title: Capítulo 93
programme.desc: Esteban finds out the letters aren't Mia's, but tells her, if she wants a real relationship where she is loved, he'll be waiting. Tomás gets beat up by a strange man when he goes to visit Lulu.

programme.title: Capítulo 94
programme.desc: Mia confides in Alma about Franco's change since his relationship with Valeria started. Nico thinks Lupita is after Karen's cousin.

programme.title: Capítulo 95
programme.desc: León reminds Paola that he did her a favor, and forbids her to ever see or go near Diego again. Mia accepts Giovanni's request to start dating.

programme.title: Capítulo 96
programme.desc: Everyone laughs when Giovanni reveals that him and Mia are dating. Joaquín faints in gym class after taking drugs; Esteban doesn't let the fellow classmates get help.

programme.title: Capítulo 97
programme.desc: Roberta ruins her dad's fancy dinner by embarrassing him and pretending he beats her. Mia plans to get evidence of Joaquín's drug business.

programme.title: Capítulo 98
programme.desc: Lupita finds Mia's diary in Nico's belongings, not knowing that Miguel is the one who took it. Franco tells Mia to ignore the rumours about her mother.

programme.title: Capítulo 99
programme.desc: Diego finds out about the ring Paola received from his father, León, and breaks up with her. Mia plans to get revenge on Miguel for reading her diary. Joaquín starts rehab.

programme.title: Capítulo 100
programme.desc: Mia asks Raquel to tell Miguel, when he's with Julieta or alone, that she is crazy for him. Paola confesses to Diego about her past.

programme.title: Capítulo 101
programme.desc: Mia learns the truth about her mom's past. After getting back with Paola, Diego hides her in the school.

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: La chica del feis
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima; Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Como en casa
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación; un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: El simulacro
programme.desc: Un temblor llega a la ciudad sacudiendo todos los departamentos de los vecinos. Luis les propone a los vecinos llevar a una persona de Protección civil para prepararlos ante una emergencia.

programme.title: El origen
programme.desc: Morris está en la etapa de las dudas y pregunta a sus padres cómo conquistar al amor de su vida. Alejandra y Rocko deciden contarle una historia de amor: el relato de cómo se conocieron.

programme.title: El wifi
programme.desc: Silvia instala internet de alta velocidad en su departamento, sin embargo su conexión es muy lenta; lo que no sabe es que sus vecinos saben la contraseña y todos se conectan a su red.

programme.title: El método
programme.desc: Lorena está cansada de que Frankie no consiga trabajo y a éste se le ocurre una gran idea: poner una academia de actuación basada en el Método Rivers.

programme.title: El click
programme.desc: Arturo llora porque su familia es pobre y Lorena lo consuela, Germán y Pedro creen que son amantes. Magda encuentra una nota de amor y las cosas se enredan más de la cuenta.

programme.title: La separación
programme.desc: Lorena trata de seducir a Frankie, pero él la rechaza porque está escribiendo un guión, ella lo insulta y él decide irse de su casa. Finalmente Benito regresa a casa después de 10 años.

programme.title: Benito regresa
programme.desc: Benito está de regreso después de mucho tiempo. Lalo invita a salir a Silvita y comienza a planear su futuro. A los López Pérez les cortan los servicios y dejan sin luz a media colonia.

programme.title: Los candidatos
programme.desc: Silvia y Arturo compiten para ser el presidente del vecindario. Alejandra y Rocko se preocupan porque creen que han perdido su juventud y personalidad.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 2
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sonoran Super-Birds: Mexico Gould's Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella crosses the border into Mexico's desert to call in the Gould's wild turkey. Of the five turkey subspecies in North America, the Gould's is the largest but rarest. On this unique Mexican adventure, Steve finds exciting action for gobbling toms. With locally made charcoal at his disposal, he'll grill up a big, brined, delicious bird.

programme.title: MeatEater - Straight Flush: Montana Mountain Grouse
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend Ronny Boehme drive into the mountains of southwest Montana to hunt the high ridge tops for dusky grouse. Ronny's Bracco Italiano hunting dogs have been bred and trained for this work, but can Ronny handle the altitude? The duo prepares dusky grouse jalape√±o poppers and grouse fettuccine with a white wine and cream sauce.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 1
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like they're on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but on this two-part episode Rinella grants his viewers an all-access pass to see just how the MeatEater crew works together to make the show. Strap-in for some behind-the-scenes action.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan float a remote river on a bull moose hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Local Motion: Montana Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steve must deal with bad weather and fierce competition during a late-season central Montana elk hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 2

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Edith's cousin, Maude, invites Archie and Edith to the wedding of her daughter, Carol. However, Carol and Maude are not looking forward to Archie, since the man she is marrying happens to be Jewish. Later, the men and the women have their respective bachelor and bachelorette parties, but a grumpy Archie decides to stay in the motel. Meanwhile, Carol realizes just what her fiancée envisions as married life.

programme.title: Archie And The Editorial
programme.desc: Archie gets fed up with a television editorial when this week's issue concerns gun control. Archie rails against gun control, battles it out with Mike and ultimately decides to go on the TV show with a rebuttal. Later, Archie meets his two biggest supporters -a pair of stickup artist who rob him at gunpoint.

programme.title: Archie's Fraud
programme.desc: Archie's Sunday job, driving taxi cabs for Bert Munson, has been a fine extra job for additional income. However, Archie has failed to report the extra income on his tax returns. Archie goes down to the IRS to explain, and soon discovers that he will be audited by the IRS. Trying to get out of it, Archie considers bribing the agent.

programme.title: Gloria And The Riddle
programme.desc: Gloria has become friends with a girl named Tammy and they have been organizing a Women's Fair. Male chauvinism is put to the test when Gloria poses a riddle to Mike and Archie who are stumped when they can't come up with the answer. Archie even goes to his drinking buddies for help, but to no avail. However, it is Edith who suddenly comes up with the answer (an answer that Archie doesn't want to hear).

programme.title: The Threat
programme.desc: Archie gets word that an old Army buddy who once saved his life is coming to town with his wife, Bobbi Jo. Archie offers to have them stay at his place. When Bobbi Jo arrives early, Archie gets an eyeful of the voluptuous woman and his guilt over his lust begins to show through to Mike and Gloria. Edith overhears a conversation between Archie, Mike and Gloria and out of concern for her marriage, makes a pivotal decision.

programme.title: Lionel Steps Out
programme.desc: Archie's niece has been visiting the Bunkers and having a great time. She's even made friends with Lionel and loves going out on the town with him. However, a picture taken of the two of them becomes the thing that clues Archie in on their blossoming relationship and he hits the roof, citing that people should stick to their own race.

programme.title: The Bunkers And The Swingers
programme.desc: Edith finds a magazine on the subway and reads an ad in the "swap" section. Not realizing what is actually being asked for, Edith assumes the couple is looking for friendship. Mike and Gloria, in a rush, try to explain what they really want. However, it isn't until the couple is actually standing in the Bunker's living room that Edith realizes, with a little help from Louise, that they are "swingers" and they want to swap with Archie and Edith.

programme.title: Mike's Appendix
programme.desc: Both Archie and Gloria come home in bad moods after a hard day's work. This leads to yet another argument over women's liberation. Meanwhile, Mike has been having a pain in the side and the doctor tells him that he needs to have an appendectomy. This leads Archie and Gloria's argument to the proficiency of women doctors. Mike would rather have a more expensive male doctor rather than a cheaper woman doctor.

programme.title: Edith Flips Her Wig
programme.desc: Edith comes home from shopping in a terrible state; it seems she had been arrested for shoplifting. Apparently, she had walked out of a store, wearing a wig, while trying to give bus directions to a woman. Edith becomes convinced that she has become a kleptomaniac, after finding that she also "stole" a necklace. Edith begins to obsess and Mike suggests that she see a psychiatrist, however, Edith has something in mind herself; she visits a priest.

programme.title: The Locket
programme.desc: Edith's antique locket is missing and Archie sees it as a way to collect from the insurance company to buy a new television set. Confident of getting the insurance money, Archie orders a new color set, only to have an insurance adjuster arrive at the house to question the claim.

programme.title: Mike Comes Into Money
programme.desc: Mike comes into some money when his Uncle Alex dies and leaves him $275. Archie tries to persuade Mike into giving the money to him for room and board, but Mike would rather give it to George McGovern's presidential campaign. This sparks a big feud, leading to a dinner separation: Gloria and Mike buy and cook their own food while Edith and Archie do the same.

programme.title: Flashback: Mike And Gloria's Wedding
programme.desc: Edith is in a celebratory mood for Mike and Gloria's second wedding anniversary. While sitting around the dinner table enjoying a special cake, the family recalls Mike and Gloria's wedding. They also recall how Mike's Uncle Casimir met Archie and how they butted heads over who would perform the ceremony.

programme.title: Flashback: Mike And Gloria's Wedding - Pt. Ii
programme.desc: The family continues to reminisce on Mike and Gloria's second wedding anniversary and they recall the actual day Mike and Gloria got married. As Archie and Mike's Uncle Casimir continue to butt heads, Edith must gather up strength to tell Gloria about 'the birds and the bees'.

programme.title: A Good Example For Harold
programme.desc: George uses a white lie to get out of meeting with an insurance agent. When Hazel catches Harold using the same type of white lie, she says everyone has to stop using lies. Hazel then has to tell Mr. Boyle (Philip Ober), the creator of cleaning product and a potential client for George, that the product doesn't work.

programme.title: Hazel's Highland Fling
programme.desc: Hazel attempts to stop Mr. Griffin from continually inviting himself for dinner because his new Scottish cook Angie is bad. She came to America to find her longtime boyfriend Gordie (James Doohan) and Hazel helps reunite the two of them.

programme.title: Ain't Walter Nice?
programme.desc: When Hazel's nephew Walter (Frank Aletter), a self-described promoter, arrives with hopes of obtaining a large investment from Mr. Griffin, George and Dorothy begin to question his motives.

programme.title: Mr. Griffin Throws A Wedding
programme.desc: Mr. Griffin takes it upon himself to plan the wedding of his nephew Pete (Dick Sargent) and George's stenographer, Maggie. When he also buys them a house and tries to find a new profession for Pete, Hazel steps in.

programme.title: Hazel And The Stockholders' Meeting
programme.desc: After Hazel's new Davidson vacuum cleaner stops working almost immediately, she takes it upon herself to attend the company's stockholder meeting to see that justice is done. Max Showalter appears as a member of the Davidson company. Byron Foulger appears as Mr. Zimmerman, the vacuum repair man.

programme.title: Hazel's Day Off
programme.desc: Busy Mr. Arden (James Westerfield) will only donate land for a new playground if the contract is drawn up on a Sunday afternoon. When he arrives, Hazel speaks her mind. William Schallert makes an appearance as Arden's attorney.

programme.title: I Been Singing All My Life
programme.desc: George's sister Deirdre is planning a talent show to raise money for the local children's hospital. Hazel wants to be part of the show, but Deirdre refuses to audition her and her friends. Circumstances force Deirdre to change her mind.

programme.title: The Fire's Never Dead While The Ashes Are Red
programme.desc: After George's former law professor (Vaughn Taylor) writes a bestseller, Hazel finds out that a local bookstore owner (Lurene Tuttle) used to date him long ago and sets out to reunite them.

programme.title: Hazel's Navy Blue Tugboats
programme.desc: Hazel borrows George's car to attend a shoe sale, and along the way is delayed by changing a friend's bicycle tire, giving an expectant father a ride to the hospital, and comforting a lost girl who speaks no English.

programme.title: The Hazel Walk
programme.desc: As Hazel battles both George and Mr. Griffin in trying to save the Pocono Trail from development they have planned, she takes them there on an overnight hiking trip, which helps change some minds.

programme.title: Hazel Digs A Hole For Herself
programme.desc: With Hazel's help, George's bored and depressed mother (Louise Lorimer) begins to develop a career as a professional gardener, an occupation that will undoubtedly cause conflict with her snobby daughter Deirdre.

programme.title: Hazel Sounds Her A
programme.desc: After Sir Horace (Torin Thatcher), the town's new symphony conductor, bans women from the orchestra and fires the daughter of Hazel's friend, Hazel finds out some compelling information on the conductor. This will lead to the friend's daughter being reinstated. Doris Singleton appears as Lady Hobart, Sir Horace's wife.

programme.title: Hazel's Luck
programme.desc: After Hazel destroys a chain letter at George's request, a series of problems develop during the family's trip to watch Hazel compete in a regional bowling tournament.

programme.title: Law Partners
programme.desc: Oliver Wendell Douglas returns from farm to firm... law firm, that is. When a young and ambitious local graduates from law school, he looks for a potential partner in Hooterville. Oliver is the logical choice. Lisa and Eb help the new venture.

programme.title: A Day In The Life Of Oliver Wendell Holmes
programme.desc: After partnering with a young, local lawyer, Oliver has opened a new law office in Hooterville. However, their secretary, Lisa, shows a lack of necessary skills. Soon, Lisa's job is on the line, even if she is married to one of the partners.

programme.title: Economy Flight To Washington
programme.desc: When the Young Peoples Agricultural Society holds their annual convention in Washington, D.C., local members Eb, Mr. Kimball, and Arnold the pig get ready to make the big trip. Oliver and Lisa serve as unintended chaperones.

programme.title: Retreat From Washington
programme.desc: While Lisa and Oliver consider what to do on their unplanned trip to Washington D.C., Mr. Haney rents their house to a family of eight. Meanwhile in the nation's capital, Lisa and Eb tour the White House, and Mr. Kimball makes official trouble.

programme.title: A Hunting We Won't Go
programme.desc: When a charmingly sweet doe wanders onto the Douglas farm, an enchanted Lisa befriends the beautiful animal. Having had her heart won over, Lisa resolves to have all deer hunting banned in Hooterville, winning support however necessary.

programme.title: Eb Uses His Ingenuity
programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: The Old Trunk
programme.desc: Lisa becomes enchanted with the diary of a Lydia Plunkett. Found in an old trunk in the barn, the diary from 1898 tells Lydia's life story as a successful businesswoman. Eb and Lisa are glued to every page of the story, but Oliver isn't impressed.

programme.title: The Milk Maker
programme.desc: Mr. Haney and Fred Ziffel try to persuade Oliver to invest in a new business venture. "Looney Luke" Needlinger claim to have invented a machine that can turn hay into fresh milk. Oliver is skeptical and tries to prove the machine is a white lie.

programme.title: Lisa's Mudder Comes For A Visit
programme.desc: Lisa's "Mudder" pays a surprise visit to Lisa and Oliver. Eb good-naturedly introduces her as the Queen of Sicily. As a result, the entire town treats her like royalty. They even go so far as to hold a special day in her honor.

programme.title: Where There's A Will
programme.desc: Arnold Ziffel, Hooterville's beloved swine is thought to have rightful claim to a $20,000 fortune. The Birnbacher pork empire has promised that the descendant of the famous weather-predicting pig, Herman, will inherit the vast sum.

programme.title: A Tale Of A Tail
programme.desc: Oliver, Lisa and Eb travel to Chicago with Arnold to prove the pig is the rightful heir to the Birnbacher pork empire. Will this pig get rich? Arnold makes a surprising prediction that baffles all, including all the lawyers involved.

programme.title: You And Your Big Shrunken Head
programme.desc: When Oliver returns home with Arnold, the citizens in town hold a large reception for Arnold. But when Oliver receives a phone call from a lawyer representing an eccentric relative of the Birnbachers, the riches go into question.

programme.title: The Road
programme.desc: Oliver is mad over the town's dirt road, especially when he finds out that the state set aside money over thirty years ago to fix it. Oliver goes to the Capitol to get the road paved but hits a roadblock when the Ziffels' house must be torn down.

programme.title: The Four Of Spades
programme.desc: Lisa foretells of a mysterious stranger that will appear into Oliver's life. Enter Tadpole Talbot, Eb's childhood friend who has become a singing sensation. Tadpole has convinced Eb to go out on the road with him and join his band as a roadie.

programme.title: The Youth Center
programme.desc: Oliver become alarmed that the youth of his beloved town, Hooterville is dwindling so he calls an emergency town meeting to prevent them from leaving. The next thing Oliver knows is that his barn has been volunteered for the new youth center.

programme.title: Oliver's School Girl Crush
programme.desc: Oliver is asked to speak at the local high school about his illustrious law career and makes quite an impression on student Kathy Baxter. Oliver must contend with Kathy's fawning as well as her jealous boyfriend is not very happy with Oliver.

programme.title: Ralph's Nuptials

programme.title: Halloween With The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: Green Eyed Gomez
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wednesday Leaves Home
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The V.I.P.'s
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: Morticia, The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: Lurch Learns To Dance
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion, after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: Art And The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets A Beatnik
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: Mother Lurch Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Illness
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she an Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family Splurges
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: Cousin Itt Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family In Court
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: Amnesia In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Thing Is Missing
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.
